allow:
Bash(curl -sk -X POST https://docker.brandsparkle.eu/api/auth \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{"username":"Roberto","password":"TgbYhnUjm!23"}' | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d.get\('jwt','ERROR: '+json.dumps\(d\)\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "
import urllib.request, json, ssl
ctx = ssl._create_unverified_context\(\)
data = json.dumps\({'username': 'Roberto', 'password': 'TgbYhnUjm!23'}\).encode\(\)
req = urllib.request.Request\('https://docker.brandsparkle.eu/api/auth', data=data, headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'}\)
resp = urllib.request.urlopen\(req, context=ctx\)
d = json.loads\(resp.read\(\)\)
print\(d['jwt']\)
")
